column2: Verify that a Guest can register a new Customer account with valid data; that duplicate emails are rejected; that password policy is enforced; and that Shop Owner registration accounts are routed to Pending Approval (UC-01).
Guest registers a new Customer account with valid data
column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Fill Full Name (3-100 chars), valid Email, Password (8+ chars), and matching Confirm Password.
3. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: Account is created with role CUSTOMER and status ACTIVE; user is redirected to login or home; a welcome/verification email is sent if email verification is enabled.
column5: No existing account with the provided email.

column2: Guest registers a new Shop Owner account
column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Fill all required fields.
3. Select account type = Shop Owner (if separate flow exists) or register normally and then submit a shop registration.
4. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: Account is created; if admin review is required, the shop registration status is PENDING; the user sees a message indicating their shop application is under review.
column5: No existing account with the provided email.

column2: Attempt registration with a duplicate email
column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Enter an email that already exists in the system.
3. Fill in remaining valid fields.
4. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: System shows a field-level error ("Email đã được sử dụng"); no new account is created; the form remains filled.
column5: An account with the provided email already exists.

column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Enter Password = "Password1!" and Confirm Password = "Password2!".
3. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: Validation error is shown on the Confirm Password field; form is not submitted; no account is created.

column2: Attempt registration with a password shorter than 8 characters
column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Enter Password = "abc123" (6 chars).
3. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: Validation error is shown indicating the minimum password length requirement; form is not submitted.

column2: Attempt registration with an empty Full Name
column3:
1. Navigate to /register.
2. Leave Full Name blank.
3. Fill all other fields with valid data.
4. Click "Đăng ký".
column4: Validation error is shown on the Full Name field; form is not submitted.

column2: User resets password using a valid reset code
column3:
1. Navigate to /forgot-password.
2. Enter a valid registered email.
3. Submit the form and receive a reset code.
4. Enter the reset code along with a new password and confirm password.
5. Submit.
column4: Password is updated; the old password no longer works for login; the reset code is invalidated and cannot be reused; user is redirected to login.
column5: Account exists; reset code has been issued and not yet expired.
